name: session-server
description: A per session-backend implementation for aesthetic.computer.

scripts.dev: kill-port 8889; PORT=8889 NODE_ENV=development TURN_HOST=192.168.1.127 nodemon -I --watch session.mjs --watch chat-manager.mjs session.mjs; env nogreet=true fish
scripts.build:jamsocket: cp ../shared/filter.mjs filter.mjs; docker build --platform linux/amd64 --tag session-server-image .

author: Jeffrey Alan Scudder
comment:pins: geoip-lite stays on 1.x: 2.x requires Node >=24 and the Dockerfile runs node:lts-iron (Node 20). ws stays at 8.21.0, the fix for the memory-exhaustion advisory — 8.21.1 is too new to trust yet (see .npmrc min-release-age). redis 6 and mongodb 7 both need Node >=20.19, which Iron satisfies.
comment:overrides: Transitive advisories with no direct dependency to bump. lodash and minimatch@3 both arrive under geoip-lite@1, whose own 2.x needs Node >=24 while the Dockerfile runs node:lts-iron (Node 20) — so we patch the grandchildren instead of moving the base image. minimatch is scoped to glob, which wants ^3; forcing 3.x globally would break anything on 9.x/10.x.
